title: Re-check roam timing under the Season 2 Role Quest rules
body: Patch 26.9 makes Role Quest progress less punishing when a laner leaves toward the end of lane phase. After level 3, time spent in lane can bank a moderate amount of roaming time, so coaching should no longer treat every short roam away from the assigned lane as automatically damaging to quest progress.
actionables: When reviewing a roam, check whether the player had first banked lane time and whether the roam created real map value.
Do not punish late-laning movement purely because the player left the wave; judge the wave state, recall timing, and quest context together.
For mid and support reviews, separate useful tempo roams from empty movement that still costs waves, plates, or reset quality.

source.title: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
source.notes: Derived from the Role Quests progression changes in Patch 26.9.
